mapper.sql: select d.ID, d.PARENT_ID, d.DEPT_CODE, d.DEPT_NAME, d.ORDER_NO, d.REMARK, d.PARENT_IDS, d.CHIEF, d.STATUS, case d.STATUS WHEN '1' THEN '在用' ELSE '停用' END STATUS_LABEL, d.DESCR, d.DEPT_LEVEL, b.DICT_LABEL AS DEPT_LEVEL_LABEL, d.DEPT_TYPE, d.DEPT_NO, d.PARENT_DEPT_CODE, d.CREATE_BY, d.create_by_name, d.CREATE_TIME, d.IS_LABOR, d.IS_MACHINE, d.IS_PROJECT, d.IN_OUT_TYPE, case IN_OUT_TYPE WHEN 'I' THEN '内部' ELSE '外部' END IN_OUT_TYPE_LABEL, d.IS_WORK_COMPANY, d.IS_TALLY_COMPANY from sys_dept d LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA B ON B.DICT_VALUE = d.DEPT_LEVEL AND B.DICT_TYPE = 'DEPT_LEVEL'
mapper.select: select d.ID, d.PARENT_ID, d.DEPT_CODE, d.DEPT_NAME, d.ORDER_NO, d.REMARK, d.PARENT_IDS, d.CHIEF, d.STATUS, d.DESCR, d.DEPT_LEVEL, d.DEPT_TYPE, d.DEPT_NO, d.PARENT_DEPT_CODE, d.CREATE_BY, d.create_by_name, d.CREATE_TIME, d.IS_LABOR, d.IS_MACHINE, d.IS_PROJECT, d.IN_OUT_TYPE, d.IS_WORK_COMPANY, d.IS_TALLY_COMPANY, d.TICKET_LEVEL, (select dept_name from sys_dept where id = d.parent_id) parent_name from sys_dept d where d.id = #{id}

select d.ID, d.PARENT_ID, d.DEPT_CODE, d.DEPT_NAME, d.ORDER_NO, d.REMARK, d.PARENT_IDS, d.CHIEF, d.STATUS, d.DESCR, d.DEPT_LEVEL, d.DEPT_TYPE, d.DEPT_NO, d.PARENT_DEPT_CODE, d.CREATE_BY, d.create_by_name, d.CREATE_TIME, d.IS_LABOR, d.IS_MACHINE, d.IS_PROJECT, d.IN_OUT_TYPE, d.IS_WORK_COMPANY, d.IS_TALLY_COMPANY, (select dept_name from sys_dept where id = d.parent_id) parent_name from sys_dept d where d.DEPT_CODE = #{deptNo} and STATUS = '1'

select d.ID, d.PARENT_ID, d.DEPT_CODE, d.DEPT_NAME, d.ORDER_NO, d.REMARK, d.PARENT_IDS, d.CHIEF, d.STATUS, d.DESCR, d.DEPT_LEVEL, d.DEPT_TYPE, d.DEPT_NO, d.PARENT_DEPT_CODE, d.CREATE_BY, d.create_by_name, d.CREATE_TIME, d.IS_LABOR, d.IS_MACHINE, d.IS_PROJECT, d.IN_OUT_TYPE, d.IS_WORK_COMPANY, d.IS_TALLY_COMPANY, (select dept_name from sys_dept where id = d.parent_id) parent_name from sys_dept d where d.DEPT_NO = #{deptNo} and STATUS = '1'

select * from sys_dept where PARENT_IDS LIKE #{deptId}
AND STATUS = #{status}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_dept( ID, PARENT_ID, DEPT_CODE, DEPT_NAME, ORDER_NO, REMARK, PARENT_IDS, CHIEF, STATUS, DESCR, DEPT_LEVEL, DEPT_TYPE, DEPT_NO, PARENT_DEPT_CODE, IS_LABOR, IS_MACHINE, IS_PROJECT, IN_OUT_TYPE, IS_WORK_COMPANY, IS_TALLY_COMPANY, TICKET_LEVEL, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME )values( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{parentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderNo, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentIds, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{chief, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{descr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptLevel, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptType, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentDeptCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isLabor, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isMachine, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isProject, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inOutType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isWorkCompany, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isTallyCompany, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ticketLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now} )
